container.heading: State Health Plan for Facilities and Services: Comprehensive Care Facility Services

section.heading: Incorporation by Reference.
section.text: The State Health Plan for Facilities and Services: Comprehensive Care Facility Services is incorporated by reference.

annotations.annotation: Health-General Article, §§19-109(a)(1), 19-118, and 19-120(f) and (h), Annotated Code of Maryland
